messages.message: Hey %player%. I’m Sam, I’m part of your Postsecondary’s Orientation 101 team.  Congratulations on your acceptance to our institution.
As part of my role with the Orientation team, I am a student mentor and touch base with students about the transition to the first year.
I assume you have been thinking about how you are going to navigate postsecondary.
Yes, I’ve been talking to some people.
Like you, I have a disability. One of the best supports I had in my first year was getting advice from peers who have already been through some postsecondary years.
If you’d like, I would be willing to meet with you and share my experience.
Are you attending the SAS Info Day? They send out an invitation to all new students with disabilities.

options.text: I don't think so, I might go see them later.
